/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libarmkidd_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libarmkidd_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/armkidd_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/armkidd_interfaces/msg/detail/world_target__description.c.o CMakeFiles/armkidd_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/armkidd_interfaces/msg/detail/world_target__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/armkidd_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/armkidd_interfaces/msg/detail/world_target__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/armkidd_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/armkidd_interfaces/srv/detail/mark_img__description.c.o CMakeFiles/armkidd_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/armkidd_interfaces/srv/detail/mark_img__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/armkidd_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/armkidd_interfaces/srv/detail/mark_img__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
